title: Industrial Visit — Airtel Network Experience Centre
subtitle: To provide students with industrial exposure and practical insight into real-world telecommunications and network technologies.
description: Students of BVP OSA, along with the faculty in-charge, visited the Airtel Network Experience Centre in Manesar. The visit aimed to familiarize participants with industry practices, network infrastructure, and technological applications used in modern communication systems.
highlights: Guided visit to the Airtel Network Experience Center
Observation of network and communication technologies
Educational industrial exposure for society members
Opportunity to observe real-world telecom infrastructure
